title: Early Check-In Handling Procedures for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: Guest requests an early check-in prior to the standard check-in time.

steps.title: Verify Early Check-In Request
steps.action: Confirm the guest's request for early check-in via phone, email, or in-person at the front desk. Check the reservation details in the PMS to ensure accuracy.

next_steps.condition: Room not available for early check-in

steps.title: Prepare Room for Early Check-In
steps.action: Coordinate with housekeeping to prioritize room cleaning and preparation. Update the PMS to reflect the room's readiness for early check-in.

steps.title: Offer Alternatives for Early Check-In
steps.action: If the room is not available, offer the guest alternative options such as waiting in the lounge, using hotel amenities, or storing luggage. Inform the guest of the estimated time for room availability.

steps.title: Facilitate Guest Comfort
steps.action: Ensure the guest is comfortable while waiting. Offer complimentary refreshments or access to hotel facilities such as the spa or pool.

steps.title: Escalate Unresolved Early Check-In Request
steps.action: If the guest is dissatisfied with the alternatives, escalate the issue to the Duty Manager for further resolution.

description: This playbook outlines the procedures for handling early check-in requests at hotels in Egypt, ensuring guest satisfaction while maintaining operational efficiency.
